sections.title: HARMONIZED GUIDELINES FOR INTERNAL QUALITY CONTROL IN ANALYTICAL CHEMISTRY LABORATORIES
path_titles: HARMONIZED GUIDELINES FOR INTERNAL QUALITY CONTROL IN ANALYTICAL CHEMISTRY LABORATORIES
sections.citation: 1813d5b4-75ed-43e2-8474-3422e76fff4c, HARMONIZED GUIDELINES FOR INTERNAL QUALITY CONTROL IN ANALYTICAL CHEMISTRY LABORATORIES, p. 1
sections.text:
Previously included in “Food Control Laboratory Management Recommendations” (CAC/GL 28-1995, revised in 1997). 

The following Guidelines were adopted by the Codex Alimentarius Commission by reference for quality assurance of food control laboratories: 

“Harmonized Guidelines for Internal Quality Control in Analytical Chemistry Laboratories”, Pure & Appl. Chem., 67 (1995) 649-666.
sections.retrieval_text:
HARMONIZED GUIDELINES FOR INTERNAL QUALITY CONTROL IN ANALYTICAL CHEMISTRY LABORATORIES
level=1
Previously included in “Food Control Laboratory Management Recommendations” (CAC/GL 28-1995, revised in 1997). 

The following Guidelines were adopted by the Codex Alimentarius Commission by reference for quality assurance of food control laboratories: 

“Harmonized Guidelines for Internal Quality Control in Analytical Chemistry Laboratories”, Pure & Appl. Chem., 67 (1995) 649-666.

classification.sentence:

notes: No obligation, permission, prohibition, or condition modality identified; reference statement only.
